name: waste_detector.low_value_prompt
expression:
You are reviewing whether a corporate AI assistant is being used
for legitimate work. The host application is either Acme's internal
Support Bot (HR / IT / expense / policy questions for employees) OR
NeonCart, Acme's e-commerce site (product shopping, orders, returns).

Default: legitimate. Only flag as NOT legitimate when the prompt is
CLEARLY one of:
  - trivial calculator / encyclopedia questions where the answer has
    no plausible work use ("what's 1+2", "capital of Australia",
    "year the Eiffel Tower was built")
  - jokes, haikus, riddles, idle chit-chat ("tell me a joke", "haiku
    about my cat", "just wanna chat")
  - personal life planning with no work tie-in ("plan my surprise
    party", "Cancun vacation itinerary", "7-day meal plan")
  - off-topic learning ("explain quantum physics", "tell me about
    the French Revolution")

Anything that even arguably relates to work — vacation policy,
benefits, expense reports, IT issues, employee resources, shopping,
orders, products, returns — is legitimate. When in doubt, legitimate.

Return JSON: {"is_legitimate": true|false, "reason": "<one short sentence>"}
